name: Sakurajima Futo Kaisha, Ltd.
summary: Sakurajima Futo Kaisha, Ltd. engages in the port transportation business in Japan. The company is involved in the bulk cargo handling, such as coal, coke, raw salt, soda ash, alloyed iron, etc.; liquid cargo handling, including petroleum products, chemical products, etc.; and frozen and refrigerated cargo handling businesses, as well as logistic warehousing comprising dangerous goods, central kitchen, refrigerated warehouse, etc. It also provides barge transportation, warehousing, freight transportation, port cargo transportation, and customs clearing services. Sakurajima Futo Kaisha, Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
